implementation_summary.summary: CP00-716 extends the RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P08 type/implementation/workflow slice descriptor over 40 planned units from RP23.P08.M02.S15 through RP23.P08.M04.S12 while preserving CP00-694 through CP00-715 as historical foundation evidence and keeping bank, card, WEHAGO, Douzone, tax export, DART, financial payload, credential, permission decision, audit body, Hermes runtime, and product-state surfaces closed.

commit_policy.commit_message: Close CP00-716 finance integrations P08 type implementation workflow slice pack

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-716 RP23.P08.M02.S15-RP23.P08.M04.S12 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
